response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (13+ years) and leadership roles (e.g., founding GISCollective, leading teams at Altom, RIDE Capital), but his experience in developer tools and build systems is limited to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, lacking direct experience with compilers, automated releases, or testing infrastructure for mobile platforms. His technical leadership and people management skills are strong, but his mobile platform knowledge is minimal.
strengths: 13+ years of software development experience with a diverse tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang, C++, etc.)
Proven technical leadership and team management (e.g., founding GISCollective, organizing workshops)
Strong system design and architecture skills demonstrated in roles like Dunnhumby and re:cinq
concerns: Limited direct experience with developer tools like compilers, automated releases, or testing infrastructure for mobile platforms
No explicit experience leading organizational change (a preferred qualification)
Mobile platform knowledge is minimal, with no mention of iOS/Android development beyond basic app maintenance
